raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased a sauna from XXXX XXXX XXXX for {$7200.00} using my Citi credit card ending in XXXX. I received an order confirmation ( Order # XXXX ). 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email from the merchant falsely claiming I had canceled the order and that a refund had been issued to my credit card. I never requested a cancellation. No refund was ever posted to my account. 

I called Citi on XX/XX/XXXX to dispute the charge and provided : my order confirmation, the fraudulent cancellation email, and my credit card statements proving no refund was issued. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, Citi requested additional documentation. I responded the same day with all requested information plus evidence that this merchant has a pattern of fraud : the XXXX  rates them " F '' with 6 unanswered complaints, and the merchant 's website has since been shut down. I followed up on XX/XX/XXXX and have received no response. I called in again on XX/XX/XXXX where the Citi rep confirmed it was still open but I have heard nothing since. 

I paid {$7200.00} for merchandise I never received. The merchant fabricated a cancellation and falsely claimed a refund. This is documented fraud, and Citi has failed to protect me under Regulation Z. 

DESIRED RESOLUTION : Full credit of {$7200.00} to my account.
